overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Mafia III) depicting a character in a leather jacket walking through a 1960s New Orleans-style urban environment. The character crosses a street under an overpass, walks along a residential sidewalk with historic houses, and traverses a shaded urban park on a sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner with stop sign approaching crosswalk under overpass

events.description: character turns toward crosswalk and begins crossing the street
vintage cars pass by as character crosses the white-striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking from sidewalk corner across the street under a concrete overpass

notable_agents.action: woman in light dress walking on sidewalk in opposite direction
green vintage station wagon driving along the street

entered.detail: red octagonal stop sign on metal pole at street corner
large concrete highway overpass spanning the intersection
metal chain link fence running along the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character stands at a sunlit street corner near a red stop sign, then walks forward crossing the asphalt street under a massive concrete overpass. A green vintage station wagon passes by on the left as the character traverses the white-striped crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with historic houses and parked vintage cars

events.description: exits covered overpass area into open residential street with historic architecture
character passes two pedestrians walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past historic houses and parked cars

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking toward ego on the sidewalk

entered.detail: two-story historic house with white columns and wraparound porch
line of vintage 1960s sedans parked along the street curb
black metal public trash receptacle on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sunlit residential sidewalk lined with large oak trees and historic houses featuring white porches across the street. The character passes parked vintage cars and encounters two pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded urban park with benches and gravel walking paths

events.description: transitions from paved sidewalk onto dirt and gravel park path surrounded by dense trees
lighting shifts to dappled shade as character moves deeper under tree canopy

agents.ego_description: walking along a shaded park path past people sitting on wooden benches

notable_agents.action: person sitting on park bench reading a newspaper

entered.detail: unpaved walking path composed of compacted dirt and gravel
wooden slatted park bench with metal armrests
low stone wall covered in vegetation marking park boundary

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a shaded urban park with a dirt and gravel path. The character walks past wooden benches where people are seated reading, surrounded by dense oak tree canopy creating dappled light patterns on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: park edge transitioning to street with parked vintage cars

events.description: exits park dirt path and returns to paved sidewalk next to street
character approaches sidewalk with parked vintage cars including a white sedan

agents.ego_description: walking from park interior back toward the street, passing parked vehicles

entered.detail: white vintage sedan parked at the curb with chrome details
low brick industrial building with bright green door

segments.scene_description: Exiting the park onto a concrete sidewalk adjacent to a street with parked vintage cars, including a prominent white sedan. The character continues walking along the street edge past a brick building with a green door, returning to the urban street environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright urban intersection through a residential neighborhood and a shaded park before returning to a city street. It begins at a sunlit corner where the character crosses an asphalt street under a massive concrete overpass, passing a green vintage station wagon. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts to a residential sidewalk lined with historic houses and large oak trees, where they pass parked vintage cars and oncoming pedestrians. The environment then transitions into a shaded urban park, moving along a gravel path beneath a dense canopy of oak trees that casts dappled light over wooden benches and reading visitors. Finally, the camera follows the character as they exit the greenery onto a concrete sidewalk, passing a white sedan and a brick building with a green door to return to the open urban street.
